local.Price coefficient (Hupijiao): RMB (yuan): Price coefficient (Hupijiao): RMB (yuan) you pay per US$1 of quota. Example: 0.2 means ¥0.2 per $1, i.e. ¥1 buys $5 of quota (1:5). Alipay is charged in RMB. Must be greater than 0.
